Then rebuild opt and re-run the reproducer to verify the select is retained. I will also inspect build errors if any.

```bash
# Show where visitSelect is defined
grep -n "visitSelect(SelectInst" llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp

# Insert early guard after function signature line (first occurrence)
LINE=$(grep -n "visitSelect(SelectInst" llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp | head -n1 | cut -d: -f1)
# Add the guard only once
sed -i "${LINE}a\\
  // Early guard: Avoid folding away a select that masks a potentially poison samesign icmp.\\
  // Pattern: select Cond, (icmp samesign ...), false  OR  select Cond, true/zero, (icmp samesign ...)\\
  {\\
    Value *TV = SI.getTrueValue();\\
    Value *FV = SI.getFalseValue();\\
    if (auto *ICmpT = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(TV))\\
      if (ICmpT->isSameSign() && match(FV, m_Zero()))\\
        return nullptr;\\
    if (auto *ICmpF = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(FV))\\
      if (ICmpF->isSameSign() && match(TV, m_Zero()))\\
        return nullptr;\\
  }" llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp

# Confirm insertion
grep -n "Early guard: Avoid folding away a select" llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp

# Rebuild opt (capture last 100 lines of output for potential errors)
ninja -C /llvm-autofix/build/llvm-build/112356 opt |& tail -n 100

# Run reproducer through updated opt
echo "==== Reproducer IR ===="
cat /tmp/test.ll
echo "==== After InstCombine ===="
/llvm-autofix/build/llvm-build/112356/bin/opt /tmp/test.ll -passes=instcombine -S > /tmp/after.ll || echo "opt run failed"
cat /tmp/after.ll
echo "==== Check for preserved select ===="
grep -n "%V = select i1 %c1, i1 %c2, i1 false" /tmp/after.ll || echo "Select not preserved; further investigation needed"
```
